title: astragalus verae
intro: Astragalus verae, also known as Chinese astragalus, is a perennial plant native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of astragalus verae include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus verae can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
